description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun featuring a robust, dark metal barrel and receiver, paired with a wooden stock and fore-end. The stock is full-sized and ergonomically shaped, providing a solid shoulder rest, while the fore-end is ribbed for improved grip during operation. The barrel is relatively short, typical of tactical or home-defense shotguns, and lacks visible ribbing or venting along its length. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, enclosing a single trigger and offering basic protection. The overall design is utilitarian, with a matte finish on the metal components and a natural wood grain visible on the stock and pump. This shotgun is commonly seen in urban environments for security, law enforcement, or civilian use.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a dark metal barrel and receiver, complemented by a wooden stock and ribbed fore-end. The design is utilitarian, with a matte finish and ergonomic features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wooden stock, ribbed fore-end, and the entire length of the dark metal barrel and receiver.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the ribbed fore-end, with minimal stock visibility.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full wooden stock, ribbed fore-end, and the length of the barrel, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and fore-end, with the trigger guard barely visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
